name: auth-recall
query: how do refresh tokens work in our auth flow?

seed.content: Access tokens expire after 15m; refresh tokens rotate on use and are stored hashed in the sessions table.
Sessions live in Redis keyed by user id with a 30 day TTL.
The web app uses Tailwind CSS with a custom design token palette.

name: deploy-recall
query: where does production run and how are releases managed?

seed.content: Production runs on Kubernetes with Helm-managed releases promoted through staging.
GitHub Actions builds, tests, and pushes images to the registry on tag.
